title: Study routine and goals
subtitle: Explain how and why you study.
overview: A2 learners should describe study habits.
Use para, porque, desde hace, and quiero.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I study in order to travel.
I have been studying for six months.
I want to improve my pronunciation.
Speaking fast is hard for me.

items.es: Estudio español todos los días durante treinta minutos.
items.en: I study Spanish every day for thirty minutes.

items.es: Llevo seis meses aprendiendo con frases cortas.
items.en: I have been learning with short sentences for six months.

items.es: Quiero mejorar mi pronunciación y mi escucha.
items.en: I want to improve my pronunciation and listening.
Speaking without translating is hard for me.

items.es: Por eso repito las frases en voz alta.
items.en: That is why I repeat the sentences aloud.
